12 
13 #include <arcane/utils/FatalErrorException.h>
14 #include <arcane/utils/NumArray.h>
15 
16 #include <arcane/VariableTypes.h>
17 #include <arcane/IItemFamily.h>
18 
19 #include <arcane/accelerator/core/RunQueue.h>
20 
21 #include <arcane/aleph/AlephTypesSolver.h>
22 #include <arcane/aleph/Aleph.h>
23 
24 #include "FemUtils.h"
25 #include "DoFLinearSystem.h"
26 #include "arcane_version.h"
27 
28 #include <iostream>
29 #include <fstream>
30 
31 #include "arcane/accelerator/NumArrayViews.h"
32 
33 namespace Arcane::FemUtils
34 {
35 using namespace Arcane;
36 
37 namespace ax = Arcane::Accelerator;
38 class CooFormat : TraceAccessor
39 {
40  public:
41 
42  explicit CooFormat(ITraceMng* tm)
43  : TraceAccessor(tm)
44  {
45  info() << "Creating COO Matrix";
46  }
47 
48  void initialize(IItemFamily* dof_family, Int32 nnz, RunQueue& queue)
49  {
50 
51  eMemoryRessource mem_ressource = queue.memoryRessource();
52  m_matrix_row = NumArray<Int32, MDDim1>(mem_ressource);
53  m_matrix_column = NumArray<Int32, MDDim1>(mem_ressource);
54  m_matrix_value = NumArray<Real, MDDim1>(mem_ressource);
55 
56  m_matrix_row.resize(nnz);
57  m_matrix_column.resize(nnz);
58  m_matrix_value.resize(nnz);
59  m_matrix_row.fill(0, &queue);
60  m_matrix_column.fill(0, &queue);
61  m_matrix_value.fill(0, &queue);
62  m_dof_family = dof_family;
63  m_last_value = 0;
64  m_nnz = nnz;
65  info() << "Filling COO Matrix with zeros";
66  }
67 
75  void matrixAddValue(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column, Real value)
76  {
77  if (row.isNull())
78  ARCANE_FATAL("Row is null");
79  if (column.isNull())
80  ARCANE_FATAL("Column is null");
81  if (value == 0.0)
82  return;
83  m_matrix_value(indexValue(row, column)) += value;
84  }
85 
91  void translateToLinearSystem(DoFLinearSystem& linear_system)
92  {
93  for (Int32 i = 0; i < m_nnz; i++) {
94  linear_system.matrixAddValue(DoFLocalId(m_matrix_row(i)), DoFLocalId(m_matrix_column(i)), m_matrix_value(i));
95  }
96  }
97 
104  void
105  printMatrix(std::string fileName, bool nonzero)
106  {
107  ofstream file(fileName);
108  file << "size :" << m_matrix_row.extent0() << "\n";
109  for (auto i = 0; i < m_matrix_row.extent0(); i++) {
110  if (nonzero && m_matrix_value(i) == 0)
111  continue;
112  file << m_matrix_row(i) << " ";
113  }
114  file << "\n";
115  for (auto i = 0; i < m_nnz; i++) {
116  if (nonzero && m_matrix_value(i) == 0)
117  continue;
118  file << m_matrix_column(i) << " ";
119  }
120  file << "\n";
121  for (auto i = 0; i < m_nnz; i++) {
122  if (nonzero && m_matrix_value(i) == 0)
123  continue;
124  file << m_matrix_value(i) << " ";
125  }
126  file.close();
127  }
128 
129  void setCoordinates(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column)
130  {
131  m_matrix_row(m_last_value) = row.localId();
132  m_matrix_column(m_last_value) = column.localId();
133  m_last_value++;
134  }
135 
136  void sort()
137  {
138  sortMatrix(true, 0, m_matrix_row.extent0() - 1);
139  Int32 begin = 0;
140  for (Int32 i = 0; i < m_matrix_row.extent0(); i++) {
141  if (i + 1 == m_matrix_row.extent0() || m_matrix_row(i + 1) != m_matrix_row(begin)) {
142  sortMatrix(false, begin, i);
143  begin = i + 1;
144  }
145  }
146  }
147 
148  public:
149 
150  Int32 m_nnz;
151  // To become parallelizable, have all the index
152  // inside a queue that would gradually pop ?
153  // or link the idnex to the index of the core ?
154  Int32 m_last_value;
155  NumArray<Int32, MDDim1> m_matrix_row;
156  NumArray<Int32, MDDim1> m_matrix_column;
157  NumArray<Real, MDDim1> m_matrix_value;
158  IItemFamily* m_dof_family = nullptr;
159 
160  /*
161  getValue return the Value at the (row, column) coordinates.
162 */
163  Int32 getValue(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column)
164  {
165  return m_matrix_value(indexValue(row, column));
166  }
167 
175  Int32 binSearchRow(Int32 row)
176  {
177  Int32 begin = 0;
178  Int32 end = m_matrix_row.totalNbElement() - 1;
179  while (begin <= end) {
180  Int32 mid = begin + (end - begin) / 2;
181  if (row == m_matrix_row(mid)) {
182  while (mid - 1 >= 0 && m_matrix_row(mid - 1) == row) {
183  mid--;
184  }
185  return mid;
186  }
187  if (row > m_matrix_row(mid)) {
188  begin = mid + 1;
189  }
190  if (row < m_matrix_row(mid)) {
191  end = mid - 1;
192  }
193  }
194  return -1;
195  }
196 
205  Int32 indexValue(Int32 row, Int32 column)
206  {
207 
208  Int32 i = binSearchRow(row);
209  while (i != m_matrix_row.totalNbElement() && m_matrix_row(i) == row) {
210  if (m_matrix_column(i) == column)
211  return i;
212  i++;
213  }
214  //binsearch only on the row and iterate through the column
215  /*
216  while (begin <= end) {
217  /*
218  Int32 mid = begin + (end - begin) / 2;
219  if (column == m_matrix_column(mid)) {
220  return mid;
221  }
222  if (column > m_matrix_column(mid)) {
223  begin = mid + 1;
224  }
225  if (column < m_matrix_column(mid)) {
226  end = mid - 1;
227  }
228  }
229  */
230  return -1;
231  }
232 
240  void
241  sortMatrix(bool is_row, Int32 start, Int32 end)
242  {
243  if (start >= end) {
244  return;
245  }
246 
247  int pivot = partition(is_row, start, end);
248 
249  sortMatrix(is_row, start, pivot - 1);
250 
251  sortMatrix(is_row, pivot + 1, end);
252  }
253 
262  Int32 partition(bool is_row, Int32 start, Int32 end)
263  {
264  Int32 pivot;
265  if (is_row)
266  pivot = m_matrix_row[end];
267  else
268  pivot = m_matrix_column[end];
269 
270  Int32 pIndex = start;
271 
272  for (Int32 i = start; i < end; i++) {
273  if ((is_row && m_matrix_row[i] <= pivot) || (!is_row && m_matrix_column[i] <= pivot)) {
274 
275  swap(is_row, i, pIndex);
276  pIndex++;
277  }
278  }
279 
280  swap(is_row, pIndex, end);
281 
282  return pIndex;
283  }
284 
292  void swap(bool is_row, Int32 i, Int32 j)
293  {
294  if (is_row) {
295  Int32 tmp = m_matrix_row(i);
296  m_matrix_row(i) = m_matrix_row(j);
297  m_matrix_row(j) = tmp;
298  }
299  Int32 tmp = m_matrix_column(i);
300  m_matrix_column(i) = m_matrix_column(j);
301  m_matrix_column(j) = tmp;
302  Real tmp_val = m_matrix_value(i);
303  m_matrix_value(i) = m_matrix_value(j);
304  m_matrix_value(j) = tmp_val;
305  }
306 };
307 
308 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Int32 findIndexBinarySearch(Int32 row, Int32 col,
309  const auto& in_row_coo,
310  const auto& in_col_coo,
311  Int32 row_length)
312 {
313  Int32 begin = 0;
314  Int32 end = row_length - 1;
315  Int32 i = -1; // Default value in case the index is not found
316 
317  // Binary search to find the first occurrence of `row`
318  while (begin <= end) {
319  Int32 mid = begin + (end - begin) / 2;
320 
321  if (row == in_row_coo(mid)) {
322  // Move back to the first occurrence of the row
323  while (mid > 0 && in_row_coo(mid - 1) == row) {
324  mid--;
325  }
326  i = mid;
327  break;
328  }
329 
330  if (row > in_row_coo(mid)) {
331  begin = mid + 1;
332  }
333  else {
334  end = mid - 1;
335  }
336  }
337 
338  // If no occurrence of the row was found, return -1
339  if (i == -1) {
340  return -1;
341  }
342 
343  // Search for the matching column in the found row's block
344  while (i < row_length && in_row_coo(i) == row) {
345  if (in_col_coo(i) == col) {
346  return i;
347  }
348  i++;
349  }
350 
351  // If no matching column is found, return -1
352  return -1;
353 }
354 
355 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils

Linear system Matrix A + Vector x + Vector b for Ax=b.

Add the value value to the (row,column) element of the matrix.
